factors.summary: Demand is growing slowly, driven by e-commerce and retail sales.

evidence.text: Our total volume increased in 2015, largely due to faster growing premium air products and continued growth in e-commerce and overall retail sales.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is growing slowly, driven by e-commerce and retail sales.

factors.summary: The company successfully raised prices, with positive customer responses.

evidence.text: Overall revenue per piece increased 0.3% in 2015, and was impacted by changes in base rates, customer and product mix, and fuel surcharge rates.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: The company successfully raised prices with positive customer responses.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is stable, driven by e-commerce and retail.

evidence.text: Overall volume grew slowly during 2015, with those products most aligned with the retail industry and e-commerce in particular experiencing the most growth.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is stable, driven by e-commerce and retail.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are growing, particularly in e-commerce and retail segments.

evidence.text: The increase in ground volume in 2015 was driven by growth in residential ground and SurePost volume and business-to-business shipping activity.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Unit volumes are growing, particularly in e-commerce and retail segments.

factors.summary: E-commerce and retail end markets are growing fastest.

evidence.text: Our total volume increased in 2015, largely due to faster growing premium air products and continued growth in e-commerce and overall retail sales.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: E-commerce and retail end markets are growing fastest.

factors.summary: Labor costs are creating margin pressure due to health and welfare plan charges.

evidence.text: In connection with the ratification of our national master agreement with the International Brotherhood of Teamsters ('Teamsters') in 2014, we incurred pre-tax charges totaling $1.102 billion ($687 million after-tax) associated with changes in the delivery of healthcare benefits to certain active and retired union employees.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Labor costs are creating margin pressure due to health and welfare plan charges.

factors.summary: Operating margins are expanding due to cost management and productivity improvements.

evidence.text: Adjusted operating margin for the U.S. Domestic Package segment was 13.1% in 2015, up from 12.6% in 2014.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Operating margins are expanding due to cost management and productivity improvements.

factors.summary: Cost reduction initiatives are delivering measurable savings through technology improvements.

evidence.text: The continued deployment of technology improvements (including several facility automation projects and the accelerated deployment of our On Road Integrated Optimization and Navigation system - 'ORION') should increase our network capacity, and improve operational efficiency, flexibility and reliability.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Cost reduction initiatives are delivering measurable savings through technology improvements.

factors.summary: Operational efficiency is improving through technology initiatives.

evidence.text: The continued deployment of technology improvements (including several facility automation projects and the accelerated deployment of our On Road Integrated Optimization and Navigation system - 'ORION') should increase our network capacity, and improve operational efficiency, flexibility and reliability.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Operational efficiency is improving through technology initiatives, indicating a positive trend.

factors.summary: The economic environment is challenging, with uneven growth and weak export demand.

evidence.text: While the worldwide economic environment remained challenging in 2015, we have continued to undertake several initiatives in the U.S. and internationally to (1) improve the flexibility and capacity in our transportation network; (2) improve yield management; and (3) increase operational efficiency and contain costs across all segments.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: The economic environment is challenging with uneven growth and weak export demand, presenting a negative outlook.
